step.title: Check hub configuration
step.action: Read global.yaml and check hub configuration: port, enabled status.
Use default port 3100 if not configured.

step.title: Verify hub directory
step.action: Check that required hub assets are present.

step.title: Check port availability
step.action: Check if the configured port (default 3100) is available.
If port is in use, suggest an alternative or prompt user.

step.title: Start hub server
step.action: Start the local hub server on the configured port.
Initialize dashboard with current project state.

step.title: Display dashboard URL
step.action: Display the dashboard URL to the user (e.g., http://localhost:3100).
List available dashboard views and quick actions.

step.title: Confirm accessibility
step.action: Confirm the dashboard is accessible and responding.
Report server status and any warnings.
